creator: freebsd@elgert.dk
text:
Hi Edwin,

I just found "ports/156876: update to comms/uarduno port for
9.0-CURRENT"

..same issue as I can see, and just tried the "uarduno.shar.txt",
everything is now working as expected, so you can close the 159090 PR,
and link it to 156876.

..sorry I didn't discover that one from the start.

-- 
Mvh/Brgds Harry
FreeBSD 8.2-STABLE #5: Compiled at Wed Jul 20 13:43:51 CEST 2011  amd64
